name: Constructor.io Ecommerce Search API
what_it_does: Constructor.io REST API for AI-powered ecommerce search and product discovery. Enables AI agents to query product search results, retrieve autocomplete suggestions, access recommendation data, manage product catalog indexing, and integrate commerce search intelligence into ecommerce workflows. Constructor.io focuses on revenue-optimized search with behavioral learning.
use_cases: Querying product search results and relevance data from ecommerce catalog agents
Retrieving autocomplete and browse recommendations from product discovery agents
Managing catalog indexing and product data from inventory management agents
Analyzing search performance metrics from merchandising analytics agents
not_for: Internal enterprise search (Constructor.io is ecommerce product-focused)
best_when: An ecommerce team wants AI agents to optimize product discovery, analyze search performance, and integrate Constructor.io's revenue-optimized search results into catalog and merchandising workflows.
avoid_when: Constructor.io is enterprise-priced. For small catalogs, Algolia or Typesense may be more accessible. Behavioral tracking requires GDPR/CCPA compliance.

auth.notes: Constructor.io API key authentication. API key for server-side indexing (private). Separate public key for client-side search. Keep private key server-side only.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on catalog size and search volume
pricing.notes: Enterprise ecommerce search platform. Revenue-share or flat pricing negotiated.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits not publicly documented; contact Constructor.io

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Private API key (for catalog management) must NEVER be used client-side — server only
Catalog indexing is async — poll for index job status before querying search
Behavioral tracking (clicks, purchases) requires privacy compliance — GDPR/CCPA
Rate limits not publicly documented — contact Constructor.io for limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: Behavioral ecommerce data for search personalization. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. Private API key must be kept server-side only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Behavioral search data with personalization. GDPR, SOC2. EU data residency. Private key must never be client-side.
